name: Advocate
effect: • At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: Greed, avarice, and power: three languages I understand well.

name: Spy Master
flavour: I can get you past the gates and the guards. What you do after that is up to you.

name: Infiltrator
effect: Place a spy. If another player's troop is at that site, gain 1 power.
flavour: Perfection can only be achieved when the price of failure is death.

name: Advance Scout
flavour: They infiltrate the web of drow society without disturbing a single strand.

name: Spellspinner
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ Supplant a troop at that spy's site.
flavour: You'll never know your mind is not your own.

name: Blackguard
flavour: They patrol the Underdark, culling the lost, the unaware, and the foolhardy.

name: Inquisitor
flavour: If by my service I can please the Goddess and bring honor to my house, I am content.

name: Drow Negotiator
effect: If there are 4 or more cards in your inner circle, gain 3 influence.
At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: I can open doors that are locked to all but the Matron Mothers.

name: Mercenary Squad
flavour: The only other option for those without a house is exile.

name: Underdark Ranger
flavour: Their knowledge of the Underdark is unparalleled; no place is beyond the reach of their swords.

name: Bounty Hunter
flavour: Every life has a price.

name: Chosen of Lolth
effect: Return another player's troop or spy.
At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: Do not think to disobey. The Spider Queen wills it!

name: Doppelganger
flavour: Nice life. I think I'll take it.

name: Master of Melee-Magthere
effect: • Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board.
flavour: The instructors at Melee-Magthere are among the greatest warriors in Menzoberranzan.

name: Information Broker
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ Draw 3 cards.
flavour: Why waste spells and steel when mere words can bring down a house?

name: Masters of Sorcere
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ +4 power
flavour: The Masters of Sorcere serve two purposes: to teach the students and to ensure loyalty to Lolth.

name: Weaponmaster
flavour: You will be found worthy or you will die. The outcome is up to you. —Shoor Vandree

name: Deathblade
flavour: May the mark of the Deathblades be upon you. —Drow curse

name: Council Member
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: In the drow council chambers, scheming is an art form.

name: Matron Mother
effect: Put your deck into your discard pile. Then promote a card from your discard pile.
flavour: The will of the Matron Mother is absolute.
